name: AeroTrail Sneakers
description: Featherweight trainers with all-day comfort and a sharp city silhouette.
longDescription: AeroTrail blends performance foam, breathable knit construction, and a streamlined profile that works from commute to weekend movement. Designed as a premium everyday sneaker, it balances comfort and visual sharpness for a modern wardrobe.

name: Atlas Carry Pack
description: Streamlined daily backpack with laptop sleeve and modular storage.
longDescription: The Atlas Carry Pack keeps work and weekend essentials in one disciplined silhouette. Padded tech storage, quick-access pockets, and lightweight weather resistance make it an easy everyday companion.

name: Halo Wireless Pro
description: Noise-cancelling headphones with deep focus tuning and long battery life.
longDescription: Halo Wireless Pro is tuned for concentration, commute, and cinematic listening. Adaptive noise control, plush ear cushions, and low-latency performance make it a flagship audio pick for this store starter.

name: Form Desk Lamp
description: Warm ambient lighting designed to clean up your workspace mood instantly.
longDescription: Form Desk Lamp delivers soft directional light with a minimal profile that feels intentional on camera and in person. It is a strong accessory choice for productivity-focused setups.

name: Drift Overshirt
description: Textured overshirt that layers cleanly across warm and cool weather.
longDescription: The Drift Overshirt is cut for relaxed structure, giving outfits a premium layer without bulk. It is styled for transitional weather and clean daily wear.

name: Signal Smartwatch
description: Fitness, notifications, and minimalist styling in one polished wearable.
longDescription: Signal Smartwatch brings fitness tracking and elegant daily alerts into a refined wrist profile. It suits customers who want utility without a bulky tech aesthetic.

name: Studio Keyboard
description: Compact wireless keyboard with tactile feel and a clean desktop profile.
longDescription: Studio Keyboard is designed for creators who want visual calm and responsive typing. Its compact footprint makes it a smart fit for refined workspace setups.

name: Pulse Earbuds
description: Pocket-sized earbuds with clear calls, punchy sound, and fast pairing.
longDescription: Pulse Earbuds are built for people moving between calls, playlists, and quick sessions out of the house. Lightweight fit and dependable sound make them easy daily sellers.
